message:
chore(beads): close bd-n8blq (syscall conformance harness)

Syscall-level conformance tests vs Linux reference complete:
- 10 differential tests covering file lifecycle, directory ops, errno contracts
- EEXIST/ENOENT/ENOTEMPTY validation against reference
- fd metadata, rename/unlink, symlink, renameat2 flags coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
